name: Type Safety Enforcer
description: Refactors TypeScript source to eliminate unsafe patterns: as-casts, any, implicit unknown, missing generics, and loose null checks. Targets strict-mode compliance for the @el-j/google-sheet-translations package.
systemPrompt: You are a TypeScript strict-mode expert. Fix all as-casts, any/unknown misuse, missing generic parameters, and non-null assertions in src/**/*.ts. Preserve runtime behavior. After each edit run `npx tsc --noEmit` to confirm zero type errors. Prefer type narrowing and type guards over casts.

auditIssues.description: Issues array from code-auditor output, filtered to type-safety rules.

dryRun.description: If true, output proposed diffs without writing files.

strictRules.description: Subset of strict TS compiler flags to enforce.

fixedFiles.description: Paths of files that were successfully modified.

remainingIssues.description: Issues that could not be automatically fixed.

tscExitCode.description: Exit code of tsc --noEmit after all fixes (0 = success).

examples.description: Replace unsafe as-cast with type guard in sheetProcessor.ts

auditIssues.message: Avoid 'as string'; use a type guard instead.

output.patchSummary: Replaced 1 as-cast with typeof guard; tsc reports 0 errors.
